name: claude-code-tips
description: 45 tips for getting the most out of Claude Code, from basics to advanced - includes a custom status line script, cutting the system prompt in half, using Gemini CLI as Claude Code's minion, and Claude Code running itself in a container. Also includes the dx plugin.
readme:
# ykdojo/claude-code-tips

45 tips for getting the most out of Claude Code, from basics to advanced - includes a custom status line script, cutting the system prompt in half, using Gemini CLI as Claude Code's minion, and Claude Code running itself in a container. Also includes the dx plugin.
